LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_CavesWithLake.lett: The Driller Squad discovered an underground lake connected to a river. Before taking the detour, they could gather some nearby resources, though nothing particularly noteworthy?
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_FairyRing.label: Driller Encounter: Mushroom Circle
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_FairyRing.letterTe: The driller has unearthed a mushroom circle. Hurry and gather these precious wild fungi!
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_Flesh.label: Driller Encounter: Fleshbeasts Cavern
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_Flesh.letterText: The driller has reached the lair of the Fleshbeasts. Note: Killing the Dreadmeld will cause the cavern to collapse.
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_GuerrillaBase.lett: The driller excavated near a Ratkin Underground Partisan base.
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_Lode.label: Driller Encounter: Underground Mineral Vein
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_Lode.letterText: The driller excavated near an underground mineral vein. You can get out of the vehicle to dig minerals.
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_Worm.label: Driller Encounter: Insectoids Worm
LanguageData.RKU_Incident_BuildMap_Worm.letterText: The driller excavated near an Insectoids worm.
